reach_why: Extends known critique of fluency bias to discovery architectures, but does not open wholly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links linguistic filtering, thought-experiment search, and missed measurement/protocol innovations under one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing filtered versus unfiltered systems on tasks where truths are awkwardly expressed or protocol-centered.
explanation: Fluent explanation filters can hide true, crucial discoveries, especially awkward measurement or protocol innovations.
